title: Create Better Fluid Tank
description: Cleaner Fluid Tanks with larger glass windows.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb90482722a54fe3bda4b4769aacad4e8915f1ad.png)

This resource pack redesigns the Fluid Tank from the Create mod with larger and cleaner glass panels, making stored fluids much easier to see and overall more satisfying to look at.

The new textures keep the original Create style while giving tanks a more open and immersive appearance. Fluids become the main visual focus instead of being hidden behind thick metal borders, which makes storage systems feel more alive and detailed.

Whether you're building massive factories, compact automation setups, or decorative industrial builds, these improved tanks fit naturally into any Create world and make every fluid setup look cleaner and more modern.
